description_long: This object is a cylindrical white medicine bottle with a secure, flat-topped cap. The bottle features printed labels with text in a non-Latin script, likely indicating product information and instructions. There are two prominent circular logos: one with a stylized silhouette of a person surrounded by colorful segments, and another with a similar motif in a more subdued color scheme. The cap appears to have a red and white design, possibly a brand mark or tamper-evident feature. The bottle is made of opaque plastic, typical for pharmaceutical containers, and is sized for easy handling and storage. Its overall appearance suggests it is intended for urban use, such as in pharmacies, clinics, or first aid kits.
description: A white cylindrical plastic medicine bottle with colorful logos and non-Latin script labels, topped with a secure cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing a colorful circular logo with a silhouette and detailed label text.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal visible labeling, mostly plain white surface and the cap's red top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring a different circular logo and more label text in non-Latin script.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing both the colorful logo and partial label text wrapping around the bottle.
